case_title: VIDEO SERVICE CENTER DBA INTERNATIONAL ELECTRONICS VS ANTON SAM I

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $175.00 FILED BY VIDEO SERVICE CENTER DBA INTERNATIONAL ELECTRONICS AS TO DEFENDANT ANTON SAM I ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANTON SAM I

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDEO SERVICE CENTER DBA INTERNATIONAL ELECTRONICS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANTON SAM I $175.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $203.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ANTON SAM I HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-1991 TO MAR-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-08-1991, GRANTED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDEO SERVICE CENTER DBA INTERNATIONAL ELECTRONICS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANTON SAM I MO TO VACATE GRANTED DISMISSED SETTLED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER ON STAY ON WRIT IS HEREBY RECALLED ORDER SIGN BY JUDGE MALLEN.
